name: skrapa
author: iambriansreed

scripts.build: npm run build:release && node bin/skrapa.js build
scripts.build:release: tsc && cp skrapa.d.ts template/skrapa.d.ts && mkdir -p bin && cp .skrapa/src/bin/skrapa.js bin/skrapa.js && chmod +x bin/skrapa.js
scripts.preview: npm run build && npx http-server dist -p 8090 -c-1 -o
scripts.preview:template: npm run build -- --root template && npx http-server template/dist -p 8080 -c-1 -o
scripts.dev-pack: npm run clean && npm run build:release && npm pack && rm -f ../skrapa-*.tgz && mv skrapa-*.tgz ../ && cd .. && rm -rf package && tar -xzf skrapa-*.tgz && cd package && npm link
scripts.release: npm run build:release && commit-and-tag-version && git push --follow-tags && npm login && npm publish

description: Build static sites with TypeScript JSX templates and TypeScript client-side code — no framework, no virtual DOM, no bundler config.
